_comment: Stryker mutation testing — TARGETED at the strict honesty-fold set (council §E). Mutates ONLY the never-a-false-claim folds: the cell key.t trichotomy (cell-diff.ts), the confidence folds + cross-model cone (col-lineage.ts), and the byte-span reshaper (raw-spans.ts). NOT whole-suite (mirrors the Rust targeted cargo-mutants posture). Gate: >=90% kill overall, 100% on the cell trichotomy (cell-diff.ts).
_thresholds_comment: high/low = the council target (cell trichotomy 100% ACHIEVED + tracked as cell-diff.ts; >=90% set target). break = the run-and-record floor at the current achieved score so `bun run mutation` passes honestly while the follow-up (cute-dbt#497) raises raw-spans/col-lineage to >=90% (the residual survivors are defensive null-guards the Zod schema already makes unreachable + presentation strings). Mirrors the Rust targeted cargo-mutants posture: scheduled/manual, not a per-PR blocking gate.
